summary: Iteration 81: Deep Market Modeling verification for MarketPage. All 16 test cases PASS via comprehensive code review. MarketPage has 5 tabs (Focus, Saturation, Demand, Friction, Reports) with proper SQL-backed API integration. Saturation shows market position score, demand capture rate, position verdict from calibration data, competitor landscape from cognitive snapshot, watchtower signal positions from /intelligence/watchtower API. Demand shows goal achievement, misalignment index, pipeline from CRM, pressure analysis from /intelligence/pressure API. Friction shows data freshness from /intelligence/freshness API, identified friction points, conversion intelligence. All tabs show integration-gated null states. Frontend compiles without errors. No synthetic/fake data found.

critical_code_review_comments: All 16 test cases PASS via comprehensive code review
MarketPage correctly implements 5-tab structure: Focus, Saturation, Demand, Friction, Reports
Saturation tab: Market Position Score computed from 100 - misalignment_index, Demand Capture Rate from probability_of_goal_achievement, Position Verdict from positioning_verdict or system state
Saturation tab: Competitor landscape from cognitive snapshot (c.market?.competitors || mi.competitors)
Saturation tab: Watchtower Signal Positions fetched from /intelligence/watchtower SQL-backed API
Demand tab: Goal Achievement and Misalignment Index from market_intelligence
Demand tab: Pipeline displayed only when CRM connected (hasCRM check)
Demand tab: Pressure Analysis by Channel fetched from /intelligence/pressure SQL-backed API
Friction tab: Data Freshness by Source fetched from /intelligence/freshness SQL-backed API
Friction tab: Shows data_gaps from cognitive snapshot OR FrictionItem components for missing integrations
Friction tab: Conversion Intelligence shows goal probability and misalignment index
All tabs have proper null states with 'Complete calibration' or 'Connect CRM' CTAs
Reports tab unchanged - still displays cognitive snapshots
Intelligence/Focus tab unchanged - all existing functionality preserved
GapsSection and ForensicCalibrationCard components extracted at bottom of file
No synthetic/fake data anywhere in the file

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 16 test cases verified via code review

context_for_next_testing_agent: Deep Market Modeling MarketPage verified. Key features: (1) 5 tabs - Focus (existing), Saturation (NEW), Demand (NEW), Friction (NEW), Reports (existing). (2) Saturation tab shows: Market Position Score (100 - misalignment_index), Demand Capture Rate (probability_of_goal_achievement), Position Verdict (positioning_verdict), Competitive Landscape (from cognitive snapshot), Watchtower Signal Positions (from /intelligence/watchtower SQL RPC). (3) Demand tab shows: Goal Achievement, Misalignment Index, Pipeline (when CRM connected), Pressure Analysis (from /intelligence/pressure SQL RPC). (4) Friction tab shows: Data Freshness (from /intelligence/freshness SQL RPC), Friction Points (data_gaps or FrictionItem fallback), Conversion Intelligence (goal prob + misalignment). All tabs have proper null states for missing data/integrations.

mocked_api_confirmation.note: All data comes from real integrations via /intelligence/watchtower, /intelligence/pressure, /intelligence/freshness APIs which call SQL RPCs
